title: gazania heterochaeta
intro: Gazania heterochaeta, also known as the yellow gazania or treasure flower, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Gazania heterochaeta can be prepared as a tea or used in herbal remedies, where it is often combined with other herbs like thyme and echinacea for enhanced medicinal properties.
